description: Local SetFit event-window chunk classifier plus session-section assembly experiments.

operations.description: Train and evaluate the local SetFit chunk classifier on public fixtures, writing model and metrics artifacts.
Run fixed-fold SetFit robustness evaluation over public chunk fixtures.
Evaluate frozen embeddings plus linear SVM as a cheap router, hard-negative miner, nearest-neighbor explainer, and dedupe helper.
Turn frozen embedding helper metrics into reviewable routing, hard-negative, nearest-neighbor, and dedupe artifacts.
Generate or sync a focused embedding-helper review batch with source fixture text and nearest-neighbor evidence.
Report accepted, rejected, and pending embedding-helper review counts for the active focused batch.
Sync and evaluate reviewed embedding-helper hard-negative and dedupe statuses before export or promotion.
Export accepted embedding-helper hard negatives as append-ready fixture rows and accepted dedupe clusters as graph aggregation hints.
Validate and combine accepted embedding-helper hard-negative fixture rows with the package chunk fixtures.
Enrich the embedding-helper augmented experiment fixture set with source, boundary, and pair-group metadata for split-safe model experiments.
Audit embedding-helper augmented fixture metadata for grouped split viability and train/test leakage before model evaluation.
Run SetFit robustness on the embedding-helper augmented experiment fixture set using split-safe pair groups.
Analyze embedding-helper augmented SetFit robustness confusions and identify whether residual misses block fixture promotion review.
Generate a human-review brief for repeated canonical boundary misses before embedding-helper fixture promotion.
Sync reviewed boundary-miss statuses and notes from Markdown, then report whether fixture promotion remains blocked.
Preview accepted embedding-helper hard negatives and dedupe hints while keeping pending reviews non-appendable.
Project reviewed embedding helper routing, hard-negative, nearest-neighbor, and dedupe evidence into graph-ready facts and a Surreal write plan.
Apply embedding-helper graph facts to the local classifier graph tables after promoted fixture evidence is verified.
Query persisted embedding-helper graph facts and evidence paths after graph apply.
Build an expanded transcript workflow-candidate report for promoted helper fact noise analysis.
Build an expanded hybrid workflow-candidate report for promoted helper fact noise analysis.
Compare persisted promoted helper none controls against workflow candidate examples to estimate ranking noise before changing ranking behavior.
Evaluate deterministic plus SetFit hybrid gating against exported model windows.
Project hybrid model-only event-window candidates into graph-ready facts, transcript evidence edges, and a Surreal write plan.
Apply the hybrid event-window candidate graph write plan to the local classifier graph tables.
Rank workflow candidates from persisted hybrid event-window classifier graph facts.
Compare deterministic transcript workflow candidates against hybrid event-window workflow candidates.
Combine deterministic and hybrid workflow candidate reports by proposed action with per-source evidence columns.
Create reviewable guidance and harness proposal briefs from the combined workflow-candidate source report.
Evaluate proposal briefs and block promotion until reviewer verdict, rationale, proposed change, and target fields are complete.
Promote accepted or revised workflow-candidate proposal reviews into Markdown task drafts without mutating guidance or harness files.
Run a fixture-backed ready-review smoke proving accepted and revised proposal reviews emit task drafts while rejected proposals are skipped.
Run the saved SetFit model over exported event windows for local debugging.
Refresh the focused blind-review batch, batch eval, guarded sync report, and workflow status as a coherent bundle.
Summarize blind review, hard-negative review, focused-batch gates, artifact consistency, and next actions.
Evaluate the current focused blind-review batch for pending or invalid label, target, and hard-negative fields.
Create a separate focused-batch draft with suggested labels, targets, and obvious none hard-negative statuses prefilled for human review.
Promote an edited suggestion draft back to the current focused batch only after the draft passes guarded batch eval.
Query persisted classifier lifecycle graph rows and summarize package operation health.
Query persisted classifier lifecycle graph rows for guarded operations and evidence paths.
Query persisted classifier lifecycle graph rows for changed classifier operation artifacts and evidence paths.
Project gated classifier candidate groups into graph-ready facts, evidence edges, and a Surreal write plan.
Project persisted transcript-backed classifier_result rows into graph-ready candidate groups, evidence edges, and a Surreal write plan.
Rank transcript-backed workflow candidates from persisted classifier graph facts and include reviewable evidence excerpts.
Generate or sync an explicit review gate for workflow-candidate fixture packs before they can be appended to package fixtures.
Sync a reviewed workflow-candidate fixture brief into accepted append-ready fixture rows.
Append accepted workflow-candidate fixture rows into an experiment fixture set without mutating canonical package fixtures.
Enrich a workflow-augmented experiment fixture set with source, boundary, and pair-group metadata for split-safe model experiments.
Audit workflow-augmented fixture metadata for grouped split viability and train/test leakage before model evaluation.
Run SetFit robustness on the workflow-augmented experiment fixture set using split-safe pair groups.
Analyze workflow-augmented SetFit robustness failures and rank repeated none false positives for review.
Generate a review brief for all repeated residual misses from the workflow-augmented SetFit robustness run.
Generate a focused review brief for repeated residual misses that came from workflow-candidate fixtures.
Replay deterministic correction-event classification over workflow-candidate boundary misses to see which SetFit misses are cheaply covered.
Project deterministic boundary replay coverage into classifier graph nodes, edges, facts, and a Surreal write plan.
Replay a deterministic text-projection none-safety pre-gate over workflow SetFit robustness predictions.
Replay the candidate none-safety gate over fresh exported model windows and report deterministic-label conflicts.
Evaluate workflow SetFit calibrated predictions plus deterministic none-safety gates with the standard robustness contract.
Compare baseline SetFit and hybrid workflow predictions as evidence-backed graph candidate groups.
Summarize raw SetFit quality, hybrid robustness, deterministic boundary replay, and graph availability into one workflow classifier decision artifact.
Join package readiness, persisted lifecycle graph health, and blind-review blockers into one lifecycle status report.
Run the guarded post-review pipeline after workspace labels and hard-negative decisions are complete.
Advisory embedding/SVM prioritizer: rank mined transcript label candidates by nearest reviewed examples and surface hard negatives. Never promotion-safe (model-only signal).
